name: #418 · 7332045896dd659356a6076b8686d1afd05a7d1b · Michał Kruk · fix(templates): allow all bash commands for subagent-only agents

newTests.name:
Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > position updates after DOM mutation > position changes when element is moved

Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > position with viewport changes > elements reflow to new positions when viewport shrinks

Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > basic position annotations present in tree > every ref'd element has [pos:] annotation in tree output

Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > position accuracy for form elements > form inputs and buttons have correct relative positions via refs

Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > position values match element bounding boxes > absolute-positioned element has correct coordinates in tree

Integration tests for [pos:X,Y W×H] screen position annotations in tree output.

   Uses controlled HTML with known absolute positions and fixed dimensions to verify
   that the accessibility tree includes accurate bounding rect coordinates for every
   ref'd element. Real Playwright rendering — no mocks. > complex layout with multiple positioned elements > header, nav links, and content all have distinct positions
